details.issue_1: The search results provided contain generic Product Manager job descriptions and listings from various job boards (Indeed, Built In, ZipRecruiter, Monster), but do NOT include specific information about a particular company named 'Built In' as an employer or its organizational structure.
details.issue_2: The Research Packet Contract requires deep intelligence across 6 modules (Company DNA, Market & Competitors, Recent Intelligence, Role & Org Chart, Culture & Reality Check, and The Intersection). The search results only provide fragmented job description content—insufficient to construct modules A, B, C, D, E, or F.
details.issue_3: No data available on: Built In's founding story, mission/values, business model, financials, competitors, recent organizational changes, leadership team, hiring manager profiles, or employee sentiment (Glassdoor/Blind/Reddit).
details.issue_4: The search results do not contain URLs or details specific to Built In as a company—only job postings that reference Built In as a job board platform.

missing_modules.Module_D_Role_OrgChart: Partial job description only; no org chart or hiring manager data

recommendation: To fulfill the Research Packet Contract, conduct targeted searches for: (1) Built In company overview, funding, and leadership; (2) Built In Glassdoor/Blind reviews; (3) Built In recent news and organizational changes; (4) The specific Product Manager role posting with full job description and hiring manager details; (5) Built In's competitive landscape and market position.
